summary: The implementation successfully addresses all three requirements: Google Analytics tracking code is installed with DPDP Act 2023 consent mode compliance, Google Search Console verification meta tag is added to index.html, and comprehensive documentation (ANALYTICS_SETUP.md) is created with step-by-step instructions for granting access. However, the implementation includes a useGoogleAnalytics hook for page view tracking that is not visible in the truncated diff, and placeholder values remain in index.html that need replacement.

hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest contains a constraint 'Do not modify existing backend authentication or authorization logic', yet a new migration module was added to the backend. While the file appears minimal, it was not requested in the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Credentials Management component with validation logic
hallucinated_features.reason: Modified frontend/src/pages/admin/CredentialsManagement.tsx with extensive validation and sanitization logic for SOC 2, ISO 27001, and expertise credentials. This was not requested in the BuildRequest and appears unrelated to Google Analytics/Search Console installation.
